Genome Technology Editors' Picks of What's Worth Reading on the Web

Oh, the Things One Can Do With An Expression Database
<http://www.genome-technology.com/> 
A blogger does a statistical analysis of mRNA localization patterns.

A blogger gives pointers on DNA gel extraction.

<http://www.genome-technology.com/> 
An article from the New York Times delves into rising concerns about
prejudice in "the DNA era."

23andMe, Helix Health, and, of course, Navigenics.

And If They Still Get Rejected, At Least You Know It Wasn't for Bad
Writing <http://www.genome-technology.com/>
